narrative:
Little Miami Local Sd (Warren) school district has 28,865 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.3% D−R vs -40.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
